features.ui_location: Ops Cockpit > Runtime Truth / Release Control
features.visible_label: Runtime Verified / Accepted Baseline / Release State
features.actual_behavior: Builds authoritative runtime truth from Config, ScriptApp URLs, deployment IDs, script ID, and whoami surface hints; Ops renderer mixes live values with stale hardcoded labels.
features.permission_gate: Admin allowlist via admin surface
features.reason: Runtime truth is core operator evidence, but Ops currently mixes real runtime state with stale accepted-baseline labels.

features.actual_behavior: Read-only guidance that points the operator back to the standard Admin review surface for the selected ApplicantID.
features.permission_gate: Admin allowlist on parent Admin surface
features.reason: This is already safe and correctly operator-oriented.

features.actual_behavior: Searches applicants by ApplicantID/email and returns review results; read-only lookup path.
features.permission_gate: Admin allowlist
features.reason: Useful as lifecycle map context, but not necessary to duplicate the legacy search UI in Ops.

features.actual_behavior: Loads the applicant detail payload used by the legacy Admin modal, including docs, payment, portal, comms, and Books status.
features.permission_gate: Admin allowlist
features.reason: Ops should reference this as the authoritative review surface while keeping operator-first lifecycle mapping separate from the heavy legacy modal.

features.actual_behavior: Builds single-applicant message preview for a supported message type; no send occurs.
features.permission_gate: Admin allowlist
features.reason: Preview is safe and useful, but should be explicitly framed as safe-mode preview for the approved target path.

features.visible_label: Send Reminder / Send Missing Documents Request / Send Invoice Reminder / Resend Portal Access
features.actual_behavior: Real single-applicant email send path. Requires preview parity and confirmManualSingleSend, blocks bulk arrays, but still performs a live send.
features.permission_gate: Admin allowlist, preview parity, explicit confirm flag
features.reason: Current Ops UI mixes preview-only wording with real live sends. r173 needs approved-target gating and explicit safe-mode labeling.

features.ui_location: Ops Cockpit > Zoho Books applicant summary
features.actual_behavior: Opens the existing Books invoice URL in a new tab if present.
features.permission_gate: Operator on Admin surface
features.reason: Read-only invoice access aligns with the roadmap and current accepted boundary.

features.ui_location: Ops Cockpit > Zoho Books applicant summary
features.actual_behavior: Runs read-only Books preview/status hydration and returns invoice/current push status.
features.permission_gate: Admin allowlist
features.reason: This is safe and operator-relevant without expanding Books write behavior.

features.ui_location: Admin Portal > Zoho Books FODE Preview / Dry Run
features.actual_behavior: Creates a real Zoho Books draft invoice when preview readiness and config gates allow it.
features.permission_gate: Admin allowlist, preview readiness, Books config flags
features.reason: User explicitly excluded Books expansion from r173.

features.ui_location: Admin Portal > Zoho Books FODE Preview / Dry Run
features.actual_behavior: Sends a test invoice email for an existing Books draft invoice.
features.permission_gate: Admin allowlist, existing invoice, test recipient gate
features.reason: Explicitly out of r173 scope and not operator-first.

features.actual_behavior: Writes document checklist statuses/comments to the sheet with lock/payment-freeze logic.
features.permission_gate: Admin allowlist plus modal lock/payment controls
features.reason: User excluded document-status write expansion from r173 implementation.

features.actual_behavior: Writes overall verification status with override semantics.
features.permission_gate: Admin allowlist plus CAN_OVERRIDE and payment-freeze rules
features.reason: Governance-only write path and explicitly out of scope for r173.

features.actual_behavior: Changes portal lock/access state for the applicant.
features.permission_gate: Admin allowlist with role/lock gating from UI
features.reason: Governance control, not operator-first lifecycle action for r173.

features.actual_behavior: Resets the portal token/secret and returns a new portal link.
features.permission_gate: Admin allowlist
features.reason: Explicitly forbidden in the user constraints for r173.

features.actual_behavior: Resolves the active student portal link for an applicant without resetting it.
features.permission_gate: Admin allowlist
features.reason: Useful to expose as a diagnostic map item for the student portal surface without enabling reset actions.

features.actual_behavior: Token-gated student portal showing allowlisted fields, uploads, update form, lock banners, and runtime build footer.
features.permission_gate: Valid id/s portal token and portal access state
features.reason: Ops needs a concise diagnostic map of student-facing routes and locks, not the write UI itself.

features.actual_behavior: Writes DOB, subjects, exam site, and allowed editable fields through the portal form.
features.permission_gate: Valid id/s portal token plus lock-state checks
features.reason: Important to document in Ops diagnostics, but not to surface as an operator action.

features.actual_behavior: Uploads or replaces student evidence files and updates linked row/file state.
features.permission_gate: Valid portal token and field validation
features.reason: Diagnostic-only visibility is sufficient for r173.

features.ui_location: Admin Portal > Applicant Review modal > Super Admin override
features.actual_behavior: Changes corrected parent email with a required reason.
features.permission_gate: SUPER admin required
features.reason: Explicitly excluded by user for r173 implementation.

features.actual_behavior: Writes payment verified state and may trigger downstream operational effects.
features.permission_gate: Admin allowlist with override/payment rules
features.reason: User explicitly excluded payment verification writes from r173.

features.actual_behavior: Builds the WhatsApp fallback queue CSV; no WhatsApp send occurs.
features.permission_gate: SUPER admin required
features.reason: Expose as a diagnostic capability map only; no Ops action.

features.actual_behavior: Emails the fallback CSV snapshot to configured admin recipients.
features.permission_gate: SUPER admin required and prior export batch label
features.reason: Write/send path, not operator-first, and outside r173 constraints.

features.actual_behavior: Runs bounce ingestion/correlation scan and updates operational bounce state.
features.permission_gate: Admin allowlist
features.reason: Useful to describe under diagnostics, but should not become a primary Ops button in r173.

features.actual_behavior: Preview and bulk-send machinery for lifecycle stage emails with preview/send parity rules.
features.permission_gate: SUPER admin required plus preview parity
features.reason: Bulk send is explicitly forbidden in r173.

features.actual_behavior: Preview-only classroom handover context. Blocks when applicant missing, not found, payment not verified, enrolment not confirmed, or no recipients configured.
features.permission_gate: Admin allowlist
features.reason: This aligns with the operator-first lifecycle console and remains safe.

features.actual_behavior: Real internal email send to classroom admin recipients after preview and explicit confirmation flag.
features.permission_gate: Admin allowlist, preview required, confirmInternalSingleSend required
features.reason: Current Ops card says disabled while the action is live. Needs approved-target safe-mode gating and honest labeling.

misleading_ops_labels.actual_behavior: The same card contains real live single-applicant send buttons wired to admin_sendApplicantMessage.
Notify Classroom Admin sends a real internal email and the preview path is active.
Ops currently exposes live single-send communication and classroom notify actions.
Project docs and live runtime treat r172 as the accepted controlled-actions baseline.
Source currently maps limited property-health/runtime signals rather than a full risk summary engine.
misleading_ops_labels.recommended_label: Risk Summary Not Yet Implemented / Review Required

must_fix_truth_safety: Correct stale acceptance/runtime labels in Ops to the accepted r172 truth.
Add a Safe Mode banner explaining that mutation-capable Ops actions are approved-target safe tests only.
Apply approved-target exact-match gating to Ops single-send communication actions.
Apply approved-target exact-match gating to Ops classroom notify action.
Separate Operator/Admin lifecycle surfaces from Super Admin/Governance controls.
Correct misleading Ops mode labels where visible text differs from actual source behavior.
map_only: Student portal route and feature diagnostic map.
safe_test_only_candidates: Ops applicant single-send communications (reminder, docs missing, invoice reminder, portal access resend).
do_not_touch: Application source outside the explicitly approved r173 UI truth/safety scope.
Books expansion or new external-write flows.
Portal reset/email override/payment verification write paths.
Release deployment mechanics from the Ops UI.

r174_r175_polish_candidates: Reframe Ops fully around the lifecycle stage cascade instead of mixed subsystem/debug groupings.
Improve read-only reports with real counts and drilldown evidence.
Add cleaner role-based views for Operator, Super Admin, and Developer surfaces.
Polish student portal diagnostics with clearer lock-state, token-age, and upload-state summaries.
Refine release governance to consume actual acceptance artifacts instead of mixed static text.
risks_if_skipped: Operators will continue seeing labels that do not match live source behavior.
Live Ops actions will remain reachable without explicit approved-target Safe Mode truth.
Release/runtime panels will continue presenting stale baseline information.
Operator and governance powers will remain visually mixed in the same surface.
Later r173 implementation will be more error-prone because the lifecycle console model will remain underspecified.
